ddls:
CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "offset" TEXT /* Memory offset of the register */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the register */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Access type of the register (e.g., Read-write, Write-only) */,
  "reset_value" TEXT /* Default reset value of the register */,
  "register_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the register's purpose */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the register */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the register is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the register */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the register was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the register */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the register was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_register_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_type_id") REFERENCES register_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of register */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the register type (e.g., Control, Mode) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the register type is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the register type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the register type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the register type */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the register type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project's goals */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Inactive, Completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_project_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated register */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the association is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the association */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the association */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_project_associations_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_project_associations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the register before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the register after the change */,
  "is_rollback" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change was a rollback */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the log entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)
